docs.title: Learnings System — Design Decision
docs.content: Design doc explaining the three learning types (content, system, experiment), the flow from Learning → Doc, and the rule of thumb for what goes where (Changelog vs Docs vs Learnings). Three tabs, one flow — nothing falls through. Changelog answers what changed and when. Docs answers why we built it this way. Learnings answers what we learned from trying it.

docs.title: IG Phase 2 DMs got account warned
docs.content: Started Phase 2 DM outreach on March 1. Account received warning from Instagram after 50 DMs. Shelved indefinitely - need to warm up account first.

docs.title: Humanizer Gate — Mandatory for All Outbound Content
docs.content:
All outbound content (X replies, Reddit comments, Instagram comments, DMs) must run through the humanizer skill before posting. Discovered Mar 13: skipping humanizer means AI-pattern drafts go live, hurting account credibility.

Flow:
1. Draft comment/reply/post
2. Say: /humanize [draft]
3. Post humanized output only
4. Verify no banned words remain

Banned: genuinely, actually, amazing, stunning, weird, resonate, nightmare, quiet, vibe/vibes, plot twist, lands, sticks, clicks, reads as, em dashes

docs.title: Reddit Posting — Always Use old.reddit.com
docs.content:
New Reddit UI (faceplate custom elements + Shadow DOM) blocks ALL JS text injection. Nothing works.

Use old.reddit.com — plain textarea, execCommand works fine.

Flow:
1. Navigate to old.reddit.com post
2. textarea[name="text"] → focus + execCommand
3. .arrow.up to upvote
4. .save button to submit
5. Reload + confirm text in page

docs.title: Session Target — Use --session main for Skills Access
docs.content:
Discovered Mar 14: Isolated sessions cannot access workspace skills.

Solution: Use --session main flag for all outreach crons.

Benefits:
- Runs in main session (has access to humanizer skill)
- 50% fewer API calls (single session per comment, not A/B split)
- Direct skill invocation via /humanize [draft]
- Cleaner flow, easier debugging

Updated planners:
- outreach/instagram/scripts/daily-planner-oc.js
- outreach/reddit/scripts/reddit-daily-planner-oc.js
- outreach/x/scripts/x-indie-hacker-planner-oc.js
